name: Potato Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 Head of broccoli, cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam or boil potatoes until soft. Mash them, adding water, salt, pepper, and oil. Set aside.
2. In a pan, sauté onion in oil for a few minutes. Add broccoli, pepper, carrots, peas, tomatoes, basil, and salt. Bring to a boil. Cover and simmer until vegetables are tender (about 15 minutes). Add collards or kale and cook for another 5 minutes.
3. Transfer the cooked vegetables to a medium baking dish. Top with mashed potatoes and sprinkle with paprika.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10-15 minutes, then serve.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
